property.name: processId
property.label: Process to Run
property.description: Select the process to run. Leave blank to show all active processes.

property.name: processId
property.label: Process to Run
property.description: Select the process to run. Leave blank to show all active processes.

property.name: useRecordId
property.label: Use current record ID as process input
property.description: If checked, the current record's ID will be automatically passed as the starting input to the process.
